results.question: Wer war Topscorer der Falken in der Saison 2013/14?
results.actual_answer: Der Topscorer der Falken in der Saison 2013/14 war Robert Hock mit 55 Punkten.
results.sql: SELECT player, points FROM falken_skater_stats WHERE season = '2013/14' AND points IS NOT NULL ORDER BY points DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;

results.question: Wer war Topscorer der Falken in der Saison 2014/15?
results.actual_answer: Dustin Cameron war mit 50 Punkten (19 Tore, 31 Assists) der Topscorer der Falken in der Saison 2014/15.
results.sql: SELECT player, goals, assists, points FROM falken_skater_stats WHERE season = '2014/15' AND points IS NOT NULL ORDER BY points DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1;

results.sql: SELECT c.name FROM coach_tenures ct JOIN coaches c ON c.id = ct.coach_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id JOIN seasons s ON ct.start_date <= s.end_date AND ct.end_date >= s.start_date WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND s.label = '2023/24' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach';

results.question: Wer war Trainer der Heilbronner Falken in der Saison 2022/23?
results.actual_answer: In der Saison 2022/23 waren Jason Morgan und Martin Jiranek die Trainer der Heilbronner Falken.

JOIN teams t ON t.id = ct.team_id
JOIN seasons s ON ct.start_date <= s.end_date AND ct.end_date >= s.start_date
WHERE t.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND s.label = '2022/23' AND ct.role = 'Headcoach';
